topic: The feature engineering pipeline at a glance
scope: Roadmap of the book; how the parts connect.
key_concepts: Feature engineering is not a random bag of tricks, but a structured pipeline.
The journey begins with foundational transformations (Part II).
It continues to selection and dimensionality reduction to remove noise (Part III).
It branches into specialized treatments for specific data types like images, text, and graphs (Part IV).
Finally, it synthesis with deep learning and automated frameworks in modern architectures (Part V).

relations.builds_toward: The global structure of the book.

exclusions: Do not drill into the details of any specific chapter.
